positive: A sophisticated, stylized vector illustration of a celestial mountain range silhouette. The composition should be perfectly centered, featuring winding stylized rivers, bioluminescent flora, and crescent moons integrated into the peaks. Utilize a limited color palette of deep indigo, electric turquoise, muted gold, and crisp white for maximum contrast and print pop. The aesthetic should be clean, geometric, and highly graphic, suitable for screen printing on apparel. The focus must be on strong, clean silhouettes and negative space, evoking a mystical, dreamlike, yet crisp, natural landscape. Isolated, central composition, high detail level.
negative: photorealistic, grainy, low contrast, blurry, out of focus, text, signature, watermark, logo, messy, cluttered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, distorted, noise, poorly rendered, jpeg artifacts
